judge_reason: The descriptions quote different verbatim text for the same FBI seal, with Description A not mentioning the 'United States of America' line present in Description B, and they describe entirely different additional visual elements (Description B mentions a red classification stamp and handwritten text not present in Description A).
original_image_tags: Scanned document page. Top left shows the circular seal of the Federal Bureau of Investigation, Department of Justice. Below the seal is typed text: "In Reply, Please Refer to File No." followed by a blank space.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned FBI memorandum page with typed text and a red/purple handwritten notation and date stamp near the bottom; circular FBI seal mark is visible at the upper left.*
